tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get contact details for Markus Tenghamn.

tools.name: get_experience
tools.description: Get Markus Tenghamn's full work history: structured jobs plus the canonical markdown resume.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get the full markdown of a blog post by slug.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Get a curated list of Markus Tenghamn's projects.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List all published blog posts on markustenghamn.com, newest first.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_post, list_posts · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_post, list_posts · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
